profile: Senior Android Engineer with {years}+ years of experience building consumer Android applications across food delivery, maps, mobility, travel, grocery, and AR. Strong in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture, performance optimization, maps/location experiences, GraphQL migrations, and quality automation. Proven record reducing app latency and API costs, strengthening modular codebases, and mentoring engineers on products used by millions of users.

experience.description: Build Android experiences across location, vendor information, restaurant discovery, and quick-commerce surfaces for Delivery Hero brands serving 100M+ Google Play users across 21 countries.
highlights: Reduced home-screen loading delay by 2 seconds by refactoring location/snapping flows and deferring address UI until after home load.
Reduced geolocator `/details` API costs by 70% by eliminating unnecessary calls and introduced debouncing for `/search` requests.
Created a `location-sdk` module, refactored address models, and modularized location dependencies to improve maintainability, testability, build performance, and code quality.
Strengthened Android quality automation by contributing to Location Tribe unit-test coverage growth from ~20% to ~50% and improving automation ratio by 12% as the responsible owner.
Led Compose support for an internal map SDK, co-authored the RFC, and migrated VendorInfo as the first consumer while monitoring a 50% rollout with no detected Sentry issues.

Advanced GraphQL migration and tooling by implementing experiment tracking, integration tests, Time to Interact measurement, GraphQL mappings, and CI workflows for automatic query-manifest publishing.
Resolved a critical Android release crash affecting 34,000 users and authored an incident report covering root cause, resolution, and prevention recommendations.
Mentor Android engineers through pair programming, code reviews, onboarding support, and technical guidance; evaluate candidates as part of the technical interview committee.

experience.description: Built and maintained a high-quality maps and navigation application rated 4.6 on Google Play with 5M+ users and 4.5 on Cafe Bazaar with 20M+ users.
highlights: Worked as a Senior Android Engineer in a 100+ developer organization.
Improved application stability by resolving performance issues and crashes, helping reach a 99.95% crash-free rate.
Served on the technical recruitment committee to evaluate engineering candidates.
Mentored junior developers and supported their onboarding process.
Reviewed merge requests across the codebase and participated in application release processes.
Refactored legacy code in response to product and team requirements.
Built location and map features using Android Location APIs and Mapbox, and handled complex presentation-layer states with Flux/Redux.
Implemented AndroidX presentation and framework layers, RxJava domain workflows, and dependency injection with Dagger2.

experience.description: Developed Android applications for a rental booking product rated 4.0 on Google Play with 500K+ users.
highlights: Contributed to separate Host and Guest applications in a cross-functional Scrum team with Android, web, infrastructure, QA, and UI/UX contributors.
Architected Android codebases using Clean Architecture, DataBinding, LiveData, and ViewModel.
Used Kotlin Coroutines in the Host app, RxJava in the Guest app, and dependency injection with Dagger2.
Diagnosed and resolved memory leaks to improve application stability.

experience.description: Built web and mobile applications for an online grocery shopping platform.
highlights: Contributed across five products: customer web app, customer Android app, delivery crew Android app, monitoring web app, and customer iOS app.
Participated in the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) in a 9-person Agile/Scrum team.
Improved two legacy codebases through periodic maintenance and refactoring.

experience.description: Built driver and passenger Android applications for a ride-hailing platform connecting passengers with drivers.
highlights: Managed end-to-end Android development, including design, architecture, implementation, QA, and market release.
Collaborated in a 9-person Scrum/Agile team and shared Android implementation insights with the iOS team.

experience.description: Developed Augmented Reality (AR) applications for Android devices.
highlights: Worked as the Android developer in a small team with a CEO and three designers.
Built features using image recognition, target tracking, 3D rendering, device sensors, Qualcomm Vuforia SDK, Metaio SDK, and PanoramaGL.
